title: indigofera mollis
intro: Indigofera mollis, also known as smooth indigo, is a perennial shrub native to Australia, characterized by its blue-green foliage and small, white or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Indigofera mollis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Indigofera mollis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
